schema.description: Describes the request body for the /bulkindexusers API call

uploadId.description: Unique id that must be used for this instance of datasource users upload

isFirstPage.description: true if this is the first page of the upload. Defaults to false

isLastPage.description: true if this is the last page of the upload. Defaults to false

forceRestartUpload.description: Flag to discard previous upload attempts and start from scratch. Must be specified with isFirstPage=true

users.description: batch of users for the datasource

items.description: describes a user in the datasource

userId.description: To be supplied if the user id in the datasource is not the email

isActive.description: set to false if the user is a former employee or a bot

items.title: DatasourceUserDefinition

disableStaleDataDeletionCheck.description: True if older user data needs to be force deleted after the upload completes. Defaults to older data being deleted only if the percentage of data being deleted is less than a reasonable threshold. This must only be set when `isLastPage = true`

schema.title: BulkIndexUsersRequest
